home.heroDesc: Find a home care organization near you — accredited ÉÉSAD organizations and private agencies across Quebec.
home.featuredDesc: These organizations are members of an accredited network — a sign of seriousness and reliability.
home.topRatedDesc: Organizations with the best Google ratings — minimum 10 reviews.

steps.title: Search by city
steps.desc: Enter your city or the name of an organization to find available services near you.

steps.title: Compare organizations
steps.desc: View Google ratings, offered services and hourly rates for each organization.

steps.title: Contact directly
steps.desc: Call or visit the organization's website to get a service tailored to your needs.

home.ctaDesc: Browse the {total} organizations available across all regions of Quebec.

recherche.noResultsHint: Try a different search term or

organisme.rateDisclaimer: Rates are indicative — contact the organization to confirm.
organisme.eesadBox: This organization is a member of an accredited home care network in Quebec.
organisme.sourceEesad: Data from a public directory of accredited organizations.
organisme.sourceGoogle: Google Places data — for information purposes, may require verification.

footer.desc: Search tool for home care organizations in Quebec.
footer.eesadNote: ÉÉSAD data comes from the Réseau de coopération des ÉÉSAD.
